name: Grupo Bébécar
message: The Bébécar Group is a multinational company with more than 50 years of experience in manufacturing baby products. We employ at present over 500 people within 50.000m2 of covered space, using the latest technology and producing high quality articles, which comply with the most demanding safety standards. By continuing to design and manufacture in Europe for over 50 years, Bébécar Group has built a reputation for developing products with a unique design, comfort, safety and innovation. https://www.bebecar.com/es/
